metadata.description: The Dataverse Instance to connect to within a Flow when using Web API Calls

text.description: The GUID of the Calculation that has been created
text.title: NewCalculationGUID

text_1.description: The GUID of the source Calculation that has been copied
text_1.title: SourceCalculationGUID

text_2.description: The GUID of the Processing Log for the Parent Flow
text_2.title: ProcessingLogGUID

text_3.description: The GUID of the User that initiated the process
text_3.title: ProcessOwnerGUID

text_4.description: The Name of the Calculation that has been created
text_4.title: NewCalculationName

text_5.description: The Name of the Calculation that has been copied
text_5.title: OldCalculationName

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [SUC] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run was successful. All required GAEB details have been added to the Calculation.

inputs.name: varErrorMessage
inputs.value: [ERROR] - Action '@{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Action']}' failed with error message: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Message']} (Status: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['Status']} / Status Code: @{items('Apply_to_each_Error_Summary')?['StatusCode']})

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Flow run has failed. GAEB details may have been partially added to Calculation. Check Log for further details.

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Create_GAEB_Project_Information')?['Ids'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_GAEB_Project_Information')?['body/value'])} GAEB Project Information successfully added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding GAEB Project Information! @{length(outputs('Get_created_GAEB_Project_Information')?['body/value'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_GAEB_Project_Information')?['body/value'])} GAEB Project Information added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - @{length(body('Create_GAEB_Price_Components')?['Ids'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_GAEB_Price_Components')?['body/value'])} GAEB Price Components successfully added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding GAEB Price Components! @{length(outputs('Get_created_GAEB_Price_Components')?['body/value'])} of @{length(outputs('Get_GAEB_Price_Components')?['body/value'])} GAEB Price Components added to Calculation. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

parameters.fetchXml:
<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false" no-lock="false">
<entity name="sharepointsite">
<attribute name="absoluteurl"/>
<attribute name="name"/>
<attribute name="sharepointsiteid"/>
<filter type="and">
<condition attribute="statecode" operator="eq" value="0"/>
<condition attribute="servicetype" operator="eq" value="0"/>
<condition attribute="isdefault" operator="eq" value="1"/>
</filter>
</entity>
</fetch>

<fetch version="1.0" output-format="xml-platform" mapping="logical" distinct="false">
  <entity name="sharepointdocumentlocation">
    <attribute name="name" />
    <attribute name="regardingobjectid" />
    <attribute name="parentsiteorlocation" />
    <attribute name="relativeurl" />
    <attribute name="absoluteurl" />
    <order attribute="name" descending="false" />
    <filter type="and">
      <condition attribute="locationtype" operator="eq" value="0" />
      <condition attribute="servicetype" operator="eq" value="0" />
<condition attribute="relativeurl" operator="eq" value="hso_calculation" />
    </filter>
  </entity>
</fetch>

parameters.item/name:
@replace(
    replace(
        replace(
            replace(
                replace(
                    replace(
                        replace(
                            replace(
                                replace(
                                    triggerBody()?['text_4'],
                                    '"',
                                    ''
                                ),
                                '#',
                                ''
                            ),
                            '%',
                            ''
                        ),
                        '&',
                        ''
                    ),
                    '*',
                    ''
                ),
                ':',
                ''
            ),
            '?',
            ''
        ),
        '/',
        ''
    ),
    '\',
    ''
)

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - Folder "@{outputs('Copy_folder')?['body/DisplayName']}" including content added successfully to SharePoint Document Location. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [INF] - [@{utcNow()}] - File "@{outputs('Copy_file')?['body/DisplayName']}" added successfully to SharePoint Document Location. @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}

inputs.name: varLog
inputs.value: [ERR] - [@{utcNow()}] - Error when adding SharePoint Document Library (incl. Files & Folders)! @{decodeUriComponent('%0A')}
